title: tectaria muelleri
intro: Tectaria muelleri, also known as Mueller's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tectaria muelleri include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a topical cream, and is valued for its ability to promote wound healing and skin rejuvenation.
